properties.name: Breakfast Club 08:00-13:00
properties.description: Join the club, and get ready for breakfast buffet. Freshly baked bread, cheese, spreads, platters, cereals, and more. This is some tasty detention. 08:00–13:00
properties.label: Breakfast Club 08:00-13:00

properties.name: Knöedelpuf
properties.description: The Puff is back! Get those titty porno eggs with sauce Hollandaise from 09:00 TO 14:00. Or enjoy traditional Austrian dumplings with spinach, nutty butter and parmesan after 16:00.
properties.label: Knöedelpuf

properties.name: Pizza Hütte
properties.description: Straight outta Italy! With Italian ingredients a pizza really can’t get any better. You might even want to order one for your friends extra.
properties.label: Pizza Hütte

properties.name: Ali's Tee Bar
properties.description: Ali really knows how to tea. Come here to enjoy a fresh herbal brew. Perfect to calm your mind, focus your spirit, and relax a bit. Or a bit more.
properties.label: Ali's Tee Bar

properties.name: Kuchnia Polska
properties.description: When you are really hungry you will always find something to eat at the original Polish Kitchen. Smacznego Garbicz!
properties.label: Kuchnia Polska

properties.name: Balla Balla Smoothie
properties.description: We all know how amazing the state of Balla Balla feels. Now image that as a smoothie! Soft, soothing, super fresh. This is how rave fruits have to be.
properties.label: Balla Balla Smoothie

properties.name: Madame Miauw
properties.description: Follow your whiskers and you will find: freshly shaked espresso martini. Cat poledance. A whole cat cafe! Just hang with all those magical kitty creatures and enjoy the furry fun.
properties.label: Madame Miauw

properties.name: Kungfu Palace (24h)
properties.description: A wise grandmaster once said: feed the belly or hunger will consume you. We believe in those wise words and recommend lots of gyoza and fresh glass noodle salad. Open 24h.
properties.label: Kungfu Palace (24h)

properties.name: Schnitzel Terrace 14-22
properties.description:
Stairway to flavor heaven. Enjoy the view over Garbicz with a classic Wiener Schnitzel. Or have traditional Weisswurst breakfast with pretzel and beer. Vegetarians welcome.
14:00–22:00
properties.label: Schnitzel Terrace 14-22

properties.name: VooDoo Coffee 7-23
properties.description:
This coffee is some black magic. Brewed with beans roasted in Cross Mountain. Hot or on ice. Perfectly paired with cookies and
banana bread. Sweet, eh? Open: 7:00 - 23:00.
properties.label: VooDoo Coffee 7-23

properties.name: Reger Republik 🍔
properties.description: These burgers are unlike anything you know: completely plant–based for maximum harmony, openness, and appreciation. Just pick your favorite one!
properties.label: Reger Republik

properties.name: Om Ganesha
properties.description: Welcome to the tiny Taj Mahal. This temple of flavours offers you authentic Indian food with plenty of healthy spices. To nourish not only the body but also your soul.
properties.label: Om Ganesha

properties.name: Burger Bull & Beer 11-23
properties.description: This is how God created the perfect burger. Freshly baked bun, organic, perfectly seared meat patty, and dressed like you want it. Grab it with a craft beer. Hallelujah! Open: 11:00-23:00.
properties.label: Burger Bull & Beer 11-23

properties.name: Neulich am See
properties.description: „Lately at the lake“ sounds like a secret code. But for what? All we know is that they serve amazing Berlin craft beer from tap. You better check it out!
properties.label: Neulich am See

properties.name: Nice Fries
properties.description: Nice guys frying nice fries. They are so confusingly crunchy and lecker. Things get even better with their homemade sauces. Dip in!
properties.label: Nice Fries

properties.name: Bangbang Handpulled Noodles
properties.description:
The bang on noodle revolution! The twisty preparation of traditional recipes turn every slurp into an act of tasty art.
These handpulled strings of love will dance on your tongue.
properties.label: Bangbang Handpulled Noodles

properties.name: Dünnes Brot
properties.description: So crunchy, so mampfi, these hand rolled sourdough flatbreads are both vegetarian and vegan. Freshly baked in oak wood fire!
properties.label: Dünnes Brot

properties.name: Spitzen Spätzle 16-22
properties.description:
Return of the Käsespätzle! Get your overdose of melted cheese, german noodles, gluten, and crispy fried onions. This insane snack
might give you more energy than you need. Open: 16:00 - 22:00
properties.label: Spitzen Spätzle 16-22

properties.name: Tribeca Ice Cream
properties.description:
Ice Ice Baby! Ice Ice Lady! Ice Ice Dandy! You got it: Ice Ice everyone!
Isn’t that cool?
properties.label: Tribeca Ice Cream

properties.name: Vegandhi
properties.description: Real gyros for real vegans. And everyone else! One bite of this taste bud pleaser and you will want to keep eating forever.
properties.label: Vegandhi

properties.name: Mr Pink's Tent
properties.description: A cozy tent, funky light art, freshly rolled energy balls, and a curated selection of hot and iced tea. Aren’t these the classic ingredients of a crazy hideout?
properties.label: Mr Pink's Tent

properties.name: Heiße Scheibe
properties.description: Techno is not enough for breakfast? Try a crepe! Savoury or sweet this hot stuff is served till the bitter (or sugary) end.
properties.label: Heiße Scheibe

properties.name: Voelkel Bar
properties.description:
This is the Saftladen you are looking for. This organic juices taste like fresh from the tree. And you can even order them with booze.
Drink responsiblylyly.
properties.label: Voelkel Bar

properties.name: Noma Botanic Food
properties.description: A celebration of Brazilian biodiversity translated into dishes of pure art, color and nutrition. Come here for breakfast, snacks, or a cosmic cocktail.
properties.label: Noma Botanic Food

properties.name: Good Mood Food
properties.description: Happy eat lucky. Have a warm vital mushroom cacao, a healthy smoothie and power up with food for both body and soul
properties.label: Good Mood Food

properties.name: Donut Pączki
properties.description: Pączki have been enjoyed in Poland since the Middle Ages. So it’s about time that you get yours! These fluffy dough balls are perfectly deep fried and surprise with a sweet filling.
properties.label: Donut Pączki

properties.name: Nerdwald Bar
properties.description: Find the Nerds. Drink the magic potion. This bar is hidden somewhere in the spooky forest. Just venture out and let your thirst for adventure guide you.
properties.label: Nerdwald Bar

properties.name: Chill In & Out
properties.description: Have a break, have a Sesamba Banana. The Ambient crew welcomes you at the water to chill, get coffee, tea, or a warming soup.
properties.label: Chill In & Out

properties.name: Porn Egg
properties.description: What a frivolous way to start a day. A perfectly poached egg, served on spinach, served on a toastie. Drenched with all that Hollandaise sauce.
properties.label: Porn Egg

properties.name: Donau Pie 101
properties.description: Handcrafted pies that make you melt. These huge snacks are filled with love and bio ingredients. Grab them to go with ketchup and gravy, or dine in with a side of mash and peas.
properties.label: Donau Pie 101

properties.name: Weisswurst Himmel 10-14
properties.description: O‘Ravet is! Zuzzel away your morning with a traditional bavarian – or vegan – sausage. Served with sweet mustard, freshly baked pretzel, and wheat beer. Open Friday to Sunday, 10:00 - 14:00.
properties.label: Weisswurst Himmel 10-14

properties.name: Morning Glory
properties.description: Knock your shoes off and get onto that fluffy carpet. Here you can reset all your senses, relax with a cooling face mask or herbal spritzer, or DIY a nourishing breakfast bowl.
properties.label: Morning Glory

properties.name: Cafe Mauzi 7-19
properties.description: The Mauzies love you – with a perfect cup of coffee, handmade muffins, or a chia pudding when you need it. Open 7:00 – 19:00.
properties.label: Cafe Mauzi 7-19

properties.name: Bar'rel Mostow
properties.description: Tap into our gigantic beer barrel, and get a pint of freshly draught regional Polish beer. Bring a drinking buddy. Or ten. Cheers!
properties.label: Bar'rel Mostow

properties.name: Nut in the Coconut 16-1
properties.description: Just walk up into the Tiki world. Sip a cheeky cocktails straight from a coconut, be amazed by our playful potion-masters, and just enjoy that island life. Bar open 16:00 – 1:00.
properties.label: Nut in the Coconut 16-1

properties.name: Bella Pasta
properties.description:
Bella Wow! Look at that, real spaghetti handmade right in front of you – just for you. Pick your favorite pasta and fuel up with that
magical carb-energy. Delizioso!
properties.label: Bella Pasta

properties.name: John Lennon Okonomiyaki
properties.description: Imagine all the people, living on Japanese Pancakes, living for today. We hope someday you‘ll join us and the world will eat Okonomiyaki as one.. yoo hoo, oh oh oh.
properties.label: John Lennon Okonomiyaki

properties.name: Dan Dan Mian
properties.description: Anxin and Anton bring you their infamous handmade Dan Dan noodles. Tangy and spicy like straight from Sechuan. Add some chili oil that extra kick. Bam.
properties.label: Dan Dan Mian

properties.name: Catuma Bar
properties.description:
Tropical aromas and extracts from the amazonian jungle.
Katuma‘s unique flavour comes from a mix of wine, Cachaça rum and plant extracts like Guarana. 100% natural.
properties.label: Catuma Bar

properties.name: Langos
properties.description:
This choice is simple: classic cheesy or vegan cheesy?
The Langos community welcomes you with a smile and your desired snack. Then you can be creative with the toppings.
properties.label: Langos

properties.name: Bing Bing & Bao Bao
properties.description: Buns out! Jian Bing is your spot for asian breakfast omelettes. Later in the day the kinky staff will deliver you extra yummy Bao Burgers, and a wee bit more.
properties.label: Bing Bing & Bao Bao

properties.name: Kosmikuisine
properties.description: Hungry? At See floor? Order some Indish-Latino food right where you are. You also get coffee, lassis and brasilian-indian cocktails.
properties.label: Kosmikuisine

properties.name: Winziger Winzer
properties.description: In Vino Ferrytas! Fares knows what you want. As long as it is wine or bubbles. But who can possibly want something else, right?
properties.label: Winziger Winzer

properties.name: Marksman
properties.description:
Just a hole in the wall, but so much more! Come here to get the most amazing non-schnaps Schnaps which is no schnapps.
100% handcrafted and herbal, 0% alcohol.
properties.label: Marksman

properties.name: God of taco
properties.description: Deep in the Dickicht you will find tacos worthy of the creator herself. Vegan or meaty, directly from Mexico into your mouth
properties.label: God of taco

properties.description: Missoir: Urinals for women!

properties.name: SZORRYS TopUp!
properties.description: Pro Tip: Don't wait in the line, download the Szorrys app to top up from your own phone!
properties.label: SZORRYS TopUp!

properties.name: Eclipse eV
properties.description:
Eclipse is an association of fellow party goers, music enthusiasts, friends, peers and those inclined to help where help is needed to ensure our beloved festival remains an open
and safe space for everybody to live out their dreams of freedom in (nearly) all ways imaginable.

Waiting in a dim, sleepy “cave” to retreat to, in case the festival lignts and sounds overwhelm your senses for a moment or two, they invite you to visit them in their beautiful Moroccan wedding tent right across from the information point sitting between the Wiese floor and the
main food-court.

Fitted with calming décor and mattresses it’s a place to calm down and recharge with a soothing hot chai tea, some nuts and fruit or just a chat with some friendly faces outside all the party frenzy.
properties.label: Eclipse eV

properties.name: Without Car - Main Gate - Check in
properties.label: Without Car - Main Gate - Check in

properties.name: Buk Corner
properties.description:
Nestled among birch and beech trees by the lake, this forest stage pulses with deep house, minimal, and hypnotic grooves. From underground legends to rising talents, the lineup promises immersive journeys and late-night magic. A place to dance, drift, and lose yourself in sound and nature.

properties.description:
Step into your sanctuary of human connection and playful wonders. Drift between workshops, performances, and healing sounds, or enjoy massages & bodywork. Find clarity in the Sober Space. Feel the vibrations of the Soundtube. Relax, recharge, and reconnect with yourself, nature, and all the colorful unicorns around you.

properties.name: Wiese
properties.description:
Check out the Wiese house music floor! It’s the perfect place to kick back and enjoy some smooth, soulful beats. The vibe is super chill and friendly, with great melodies and deep bass that’ll keep you grooving all night. This is the place to really immerse yourself in the warm, soulful sounds of House music, for good vibes and good times.

properties.name: Juicy Bar
properties.description:
What to say? It’s a ‘if you know, you know’ thing... It began as a humble juice hut that morphed into a wild dance floor, attracting global misfits alike. Our suggestion: hit the floor and see it with your own eyes. Then you’ll know too. It’s hard to explain, but real easy to love.

properties.name: Junkyard
properties.description: A clearing behind Wiese, half-woods, half-wreck. Mud packed down by boots, broken lights hanging from old antennae. The junkyard crew reclaimed it with a stubborn mood. In the trees, tarp flutters like tired flags. Burnt-out speakers turned into shrines. Dance to noise, rhythms.
properties.label: Junkyard

properties.name: Weinbar
properties.description:
The Garbicz cult classic just got reinvented. And that means: more wine, more bubbles. A better, even more fun program including vinyl DJs and karaoke. Even a Champagne tasting! Let’s get winy.

properties.name: Loco Paraiso
properties.description:
Welcome to a crazy paradise that blends Mexico's vibrant soul with Berlin's creative chaos in the depths of the Polish forest. Join us for a four-day burst of sonic, sabor, and soul. And expect nothing less than godly tacos, psychedelic grooves, and surreal magic – all powered by Wroctaw's Sound Experience crew.

properties.name: Nerd Wald
properties.description:
This year‘s curation of art installations aims for experiment and playfulness. Venture out into that nerdy forest. Explore, get lost, find yourself again, be silly, and do it all over again.

Attractor by ArtesMobiles | kuker/site by Janis Polar
A cute little windchime by Artificial Owl | Promises by Cosme
Breakthrough Bar by Mascha’s crew
Physics in the woods by Experimental Stage Project
Slitscan by Das Shining | Curvature by Tamer Nakisci

BETWEEN SEE FLOOR AND THE AMBIENT FLOOR

properties.name: Pleasure Island
properties.description:
Welcome to Pleasure Island. Where Afro meets Trance, and tooth gems sparkle up your smile while dancing next to the lake. Between disco and desire, performance and play, this is where softness is a superpower and the bold, and the sexy come alive. It's not a stage – it’s a space to be seen, to transform, to let go.

properties.name: Wald
properties.description:
Get ready to hit the Wald floor! This is the place to be if you love hard, driving techno beats that will get you dancing all night long. With a straight-forward, energetic vibe, this spot is perfect for those who crave the heavier, more energetic sounds. The light setup is next level, creating a super cool atmosphere, and the laser show will blow your mind and elevate your dance experience to the next level.

properties.name: See
properties.description:
See floor is the village square of Garbicz Festival. And its rule is: Everything is allowed! Everything must be! Start the afternoon with an onstage cooking show, carefully curated music or folkloric concerts, or enjoy cabaret and drag performances in the evening. This goes all the way to mindless niche raving through the night.

properties.name: Ambient
properties.description:
Lila Collective delivers a multidimensional sanctuary of deep listening, ambient textures, and sensory immersion – blending world music, organic-electronic soundscapes, live acts, sunrise rituals, video installations, scent, and tea bar in a dreamlike, living stage experience.

Friday
12:00 *Opening ceremony*
Lila Collective
